messages.Drop a ZIP file into the terminal or ent: Drop a ZIP file into the terminal or enter its path.
messages.Changes remain in a draft until Review a: Changes remain in a draft until Review and save succeeds.
messages.Choose the local server Zipflow should c: Choose the local server Zipflow should contact.
messages.Configure the language of model instruct: Configure the language of model instructions, summaries, and generated commit messages independently.
messages.Run the current LLM rules against a stor: Run the current LLM rules against a stored historical patch without changing project files.
messages.Compare Guarded and Full autopilot decis: Compare Guarded and Full autopilot decisions against a stored run without changing project files.
messages.No project files, Git state, backups, so: No project files, Git state, backups, source archives, or run history will be changed.
messages.The current model configuration will be: The current model configuration will be used for both autopilot profiles.
messages.Safe-only mode stops at gates that requi: Safe-only mode stops at gates that require risky authority; Full mode may evaluate every supported action.
messages.Project files, Git state, backups, and h: Project files, Git state, backups, and history will not be changed.
messages.Zipflow is preserving the project state: Zipflow is preserving the project state while this step runs.
Use Exit or Ctrl+C to close Zipflow.
messages.Choose the language used by Zipflow itse: Choose the language used by Zipflow itself. Custom JSON language packs are loaded from ~/.zipflow/languages.
messages.Use the operating-system language when a: Use the operating-system language when a matching pack is installed; otherwise use English.
messages.This run contains no decision gates that: This run contains no decision gates that can be simulated.
messages.Directory selected · enter the command a: Directory selected · enter the command after ::
messages.Add current files and create the first c: Add current files and create the first commit
messages.Advanced: keep all flagged files in the: Advanced: keep all flagged files in the archive
messages.Allow risky supported decisions while re: Allow risky supported decisions while retaining protected-file and command allowlist rules.
Apply every change shown in this group.
messages.Archive appears older than the last appl: Archive appears older than the last applied archive
messages.Ask the local model to choose the Git re: Ask the local model to choose the Git result again.
messages.Ask the local model to decide deployment: Ask the local model to decide deployment again.
messages.Ask the local model to decide this faile: Ask the local model to decide this failed-check checkpoint again.
messages.Ask the local model to decide this plan: Ask the local model to decide this plan checkpoint again.
messages.Asking the local LLM to explain the erro: Asking the local LLM to explain the error
messages.Asking the local LLM to explain the fail: Asking the local LLM to explain the failed check
messages.Autopilot is choosing the Git result: Autopilot is choosing the Git result
messages.Autopilot is reviewing the update plan: Autopilot is reviewing the update plan
messages.Backups still work, but Zipflow cannot d: Backups still work, but Zipflow cannot distinguish local edits from archive changes as precisely.
messages.Browse added, changed, and removed paths: Browse added, changed, and removed paths; Enter opens the stored diff
messages.Browse every stored file diff without re: Browse every stored file diff without returning to the file list
messages.Browse the project as a tree and choose: Browse the project as a tree and choose individual folders or files.
messages.Build a new workflow from recommendation: Build a new workflow from recommendations. The current workflow stays active until the new one is saved.
messages.Cancel the advisory LLM step; determinis: Cancel the advisory LLM step; deterministic protections remain active
messages.Cancel this run without changing the pro: Cancel this run without changing the project
messages.Check and local LLM duration history, su: Check and local LLM duration history, success rate, medians, and recent trend
messages.Check provider, model, token, and run th: Check provider, model, token, and run the model compatibility test
messages.Choose a ZIP archive and use the saved w: Choose a ZIP archive and use the saved workflow
messages.Choose a local model and pass its autono: Choose a local model and pass its autonomous decision compatibility test in Ctrl+B settings.
messages.Choose output path and create ZIP: Choose output path and create ZIP
messages.Combining file-by-file notes into the fi: Combining file-by-file notes into the final response
messages.Compare Guarded and Full autopilot decis: Compare Guarded and Full autopilot decisions on a stored run without changing the project.
messages.Complete an archive update before using: Complete an archive update before using historical autopilot simulation.
messages.Complete an archive update with a stored: Complete an archive update with a stored patch before using historical replay.
messages.Complete checks or a local LLM request t: Complete checks or a local LLM request to build history.
messages.Connecting to the local LLM server: Connecting to the local LLM server
messages.Control whether successful updates recor: Control whether successful updates record managed paths and inspect the current project history.
messages.Copy a compact summary with changes, che: Copy a compact summary with changes, checks, commit, and deployment

messages.Copy the error, current screen, project,: Copy the error, current screen, project, and run identifiers
Copy the error, current screen, project, and run information

messages.Define an additional project validation: Define an additional project validation command
messages.Directory where completed source ZIPs ar: Directory where completed source ZIPs are moved.
messages.Discard only the current draft and rebui: Discard only the current draft and rebuild recommendations from the workspace.
messages.Discard this plan and return to ZIP sele: Discard this plan and return to ZIP selection
messages.Discard unsaved parameter changes and re: Discard unsaved parameter changes and return to available models.
messages.Do not commit the applied update: Do not commit the applied update
messages.Edit the preferred proposal, then press: Edit the preferred proposal, then press Enter to create the commit.
Enable Ollama or LM Studio first.
Enable a local LLM provider first.
Enter a message for the first commit.

Exclude all files shown by this tree.

messages.Generate the default archive filename in: Generate the default archive filename in this directory.

messages.How long Zipflow-managed archives may re: How long Zipflow-managed archives may remain in storage.
messages.Ignore detected subprojects when suggest: Ignore detected subprojects when suggesting commands.
messages.Include every path visible in this tree,: Include every path visible in this tree, including flagged paths.
messages.Include ignored files too. A safety revi: Include ignored files too. A safety review identifies likely secrets, private data, generated directories, and very large files.
messages.Include normal project files and exclude: Include normal project files and exclude ignored, generated, protected, and flagged paths.
messages.Include the selected internal directory: Include the selected internal directory in this ZIP
messages.Include tracked and untracked files, exc: Include tracked and untracked files, except paths matched by project ignore rules.
messages.Inspect every flagged file and decide wh: Inspect every flagged file and decide whether it should remain included in the ZIP.
messages.Inspect groups and diffs before deciding: Inspect groups and diffs before deciding whether to apply
messages.Keep Zipflow ready for the next ZIP; Esc: Keep Zipflow ready for the next ZIP; Esc returns to the project menu
messages.Keep all local in this group: Keep all local in this group
messages.Keep deterministic planning, backups, co: Keep deterministic planning, backups, conflict handling, and checks
messages.Keep local for all remaining conflicts: Keep local for all remaining conflicts
messages.Keep the currently saved workflow unchan: Keep the currently saved workflow unchanged
messages.Keep the recorded local update without r: Keep the recorded local update without running the configured deployment command.
messages.Leaving the new setup before saving keep: Leaving the new setup before saving keeps the current workflow unchanged.
messages.Local LLM summary was not generated: Local LLM summary was not generated

messages.Provider, model, languages, review behav: Provider, model, languages, review behavior, and authentication.

messages.Rebuild the plan against the current pro: Rebuild the plan against the current project state
messages.Recommended when this ZIP was selected a: Recommended when this ZIP was selected accidentally
messages.Record the deployment failure without ro: Record the deployment failure without rolling back local files
messages.Repeat the failed operation without rebu: Repeat the failed operation without rebuilding the whole workflow
messages.Resets the current tree to Zipflow’s rec: Resets the current tree to Zipflow’s recommended export selection. This is an action, not another screen.
Resize the terminal to at least 58×20.
messages.Restore the exact files captured before: Restore the exact files captured before this run.
messages.Restore the exact local state from befor: Restore the exact local state from before this run

messages.Retention and storage for rollback backu: Retention and storage for rollback backups.
messages.Return to archive selection with the sav: Return to archive selection with the saved workflow

Return to the Local LLM settings page.
messages.Return to the project without retrying t: Return to the project without retrying the failed action
messages.Return to workflow sections without disc: Return to workflow sections without discarding the draft.
messages.Return without changing the draft or the: Return without changing the draft or the saved workflow.
messages.Reveal the created archive in the system: Reveal the created archive in the system file manager
messages.Review allowed actions, confidence, evid: Review allowed actions, confidence, evidence, risks, drift, and execution status.
messages.Review and update the workflow; nothing: Review and update the workflow; nothing changes until you confirm the final step
messages.Review every section before replacing th: Review every section before replacing the active workflow
messages.Review files not recommended for this ZI: Review files not recommended for this ZIP ›
messages.Run git add --all and commit everything: Run git add --all and commit everything not excluded by .gitignore as “Initial commit”.
messages.Run only when selected; deployment is no: Run only when selected; deployment is not retried automatically
messages.Run only when selected; the automatic up: Run only when selected; the automatic update workflow is unchanged
messages.Safe files still apply; conflicting loca: Safe files still apply; conflicting local files remain unchanged
messages.Save these parameters, make this the sel: Save these parameters, make this the selected model, and keep only its LLM instance loaded.
messages.Save this complete configuration and mak: Save this complete configuration and make it active for the next update.
messages.Scan the workspace root and one director: Scan the workspace root and one directory level again.
messages.See the reason, inspect a diff, and choo: See the reason, inspect a diff, and choose the winning version
messages.Settings are available after this operat: Settings are available after this operation finishes
messages.Show suggestions in Activity without cha: Show suggestions in Activity without changing the existing file.
messages.Show the categories in Activity before d: Show the categories in Activity before deciding.
messages.Snapshot contains far fewer files than t: Snapshot contains far fewer files than the previous archive
messages.Snapshot would remove a large part of th: Snapshot would remove a large part of the project
messages.Source archive policy could not be appli: Source archive policy could not be applied
messages.Storage scan is unavailable while anothe: Storage scan is unavailable while another operation is active
messages.Switch between unified and side-by-side: Switch between unified and side-by-side views with M
messages.Tab completes paths. Choose a directory: Tab completes paths. Choose a directory to generate the archive filename automatically.
messages.The active workflow uses managed-file hi: The active workflow uses managed-file history for snapshot deletion. Change that workflow policy first.
messages.The local LLM may accept risky updates,: The local LLM may accept risky updates, keep failed results, rewrite eligible local commits, and run configured deployment.
messages.The local LLM may resolve routine and re: The local LLM may resolve routine and reversible decisions. Zipflow pauses for meaningful risk or low confidence.
messages.The normal Zipflow backup is still creat: The normal Zipflow backup is still created and supports rollback
messages.The repository remains initialized, but: The repository remains initialized, but files stay uncommitted.
messages.The saved workflow remains active until: The saved workflow remains active until the replacement workflow reaches Review and save.
messages.The stored patch for this run is unavail: The stored patch for this run is unavailable
messages.This historical run has no decisions to: This historical run has no decisions to simulate
messages.Type a path, name, or description: Type a path, name, or description
messages.Unit: whole days. Enter 0 to disable age: Unit: whole days. Enter 0 to disable age-based cleanup.
messages.Units: B, KB, MB, GB, KiB, MiB, GiB. Ent: Units: B, KB, MB, GB, KiB, MiB, GiB. Enter 0 for no size limit.
messages.Use a command directly, or path/ :: comm: Use a command directly, or path/ :: command to run in a subdirectory.
messages.Use a type label even when standard mark: Use a type label even when standard marker files were not found.
messages.Use archive for all remaining conflicts: Use archive for all remaining conflicts
messages.Zipflow follows workflow rules and asks: Zipflow follows workflow rules and asks you at every unresolved decision.
messages.Zipflow never rewrites or appends to an: Zipflow never rewrites or appends to an existing .gitignore.
messages.npm test or web/ :: npm test: npm test  or  web/ :: npm test
